subcodes.first_line: The figurative world and the physical world are both pure nonexistence, but they appear in the garb of being.
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک ورقه مبارکه ازلیه ابدیه تنطق بالحق بانه انا الله لا اله الا هو و انه کان
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love of God
